question.label: Controllable delivery
question.name: When delivery felt controllable, what felt unclear or out of reach?
question.description: Drills into his 'delivery felt controllable' comment to surface what the promotion feedback left vague.

answer: Mentoring has been one place where I still feel useful.

assessment.note: He answered a clarity probe by locating usefulness in mentoring instead of naming what became clear, which signals the path still feels vague; also surfaced mentoring as a concrete growth thread.

new_queue.label: Mentoring usefulness
new_queue.name: Mentoring feels useful — what is it giving you that other parts of the role aren't?

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?

new_queue.label: Path forward
new_queue.name: What concrete path do you think exists for you from here?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What support from me would make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
Mentoring has been one place where I still feel useful.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
